operations.purpose: shallow recessed dirt perimeter base around site (one-layer ground fill).

ensure interior space is hollow (clear internal volume above the wooden floor).
continuous one-block-wide white border / plinth around building footprint at ground level (outer shell).
stonebrick lower wall band base layer (one block high) inset one from white border.
west short-side entrance opening placeholder (one-wide).
east short-side entrance placeholder (alternative opening; keeps symmetry).
south-west short-side vertical cobblestone corner accent (extends up two blocks above wall band).

north-east short-side vertical cobblestone corner accent.
open entrance volume (one-wide, two-high) at south short side for accessibility.
open alternative symmetrical entrance volume at north short side (keeps one clear opening).
first roof layer (stepped) - widest layer of oak planks extending one beyond white border to create eave.
second roof layer (inset), stepped towards ridge.
ridge roof layer (center highest strip) forming gable ridge along long axis.
stone slab caps at west roof and corner edges (trim); applied where slabs are single-thickness accents on steps.
stone slab caps at east roof and corner edges (trim).
